series_metadata.series_title: SD-100 School District Income Tax Return
series_metadata.series_description: This form is used to file a return for residents, part-year residents and nonresidents of public school districts that have an income tax levied.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Maintain paper for 4 years after scanned on ODT Info Image System then destroy. ; Electronic: Electronic record is kept for 10 years via the ODT Info Image System then erased., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
